meta.description: Certification and compliance guide for startups and growing SMEs
meta.disclaimer: CertiRehber is an informational decision-support platform. Final compliance, certification, and legal obligations should always be confirmed with official authorities and accredited certification bodies.

journey.title: Clarify your company profile
journey.description: Your sector, team size, business stage, and data-processing model define your starting compliance scope.

journey.title: Mark your target markets
journey.description: Turkey, Europe, the United States, China, and global expansion plans each bring different requirements.

journey.title: Separate mandatory and strategic needs
journey.description: Legal obligations and growth-oriented certifications should be prioritized differently.

journey.title: Build the preparation package
journey.description: Policies, process documents, training plans, technical files, and audit readiness should be planned together.

certificates.name: KVKK Compliance Program
certificates.summary: Core privacy compliance framework for organizations processing personal data in Turkey.
certificates.officialHint: Review VERBIS obligations, privacy notices, data inventory, and retention-destruction policies together.

certificates.name: GDPR Compliance Framework
certificates.summary: Privacy and data-protection requirements for companies handling EU residents' personal data.
certificates.officialHint: If you sell into the EU, country-specific obligations may apply in addition to GDPR.

certificates.name: PIPL Compliance Requirements
certificates.summary: Strict privacy and cross-border transfer rules for companies serving China or processing Chinese personal data.
certificates.officialHint: Data localization and security assessment requirements should be reviewed early.

certificates.name: CCPA / CPRA Compliance Program
certificates.summary: Privacy compliance pathway for companies serving California consumers and meeting relevant thresholds.
certificates.officialHint: US state-level privacy rules vary, so California may not be the only framework you need.

certificates.name: CE Marking / CE Conformity Process
certificates.summary: Required product conformity pathway for regulated goods entering the European and Turkish markets.
certificates.officialHint: Testing, technical files, labels, and declarations should be handled as one package.

certificates.name: FDA Approval / FDA Readiness
certificates.summary: Market-entry preparation for regulated products in the United States, especially health and food categories.
certificates.officialHint: Product classification drives whether registration, filing, 510(k), or facility obligations apply.

certificates.name: CCC Certification
certificates.summary: Compulsory product certification route for certain goods sold in China.
certificates.officialHint: Product classification and scope validation should be confirmed before certification work starts.

certificates.name: ISO 27001 Information Security Management System
certificates.summary: Global trust and security framework for companies that want stronger enterprise readiness.
certificates.officialHint: Frequently requested in B2B sales, procurement, and security due diligence processes.

certificates.name: ISO 9001 Quality Management System
certificates.summary: Widely recognized quality framework that supports process maturity and corporate sales credibility.
certificates.officialHint: Often the first formal management-system certificate for scaling companies.

certificates.name: ISO 22000 Food Safety Management System
certificates.summary: Food safety management model focused on traceability, hazard control, and audit readiness.
certificates.officialHint: Especially valuable for supply-chain trust, retail onboarding, and export readiness.

certificates.name: ISO 13485 Medical Device Quality Management System
certificates.summary: Quality framework for medical-device companies seeking stronger regulated-market readiness.
certificates.officialHint: Should be evaluated together with target-market device regulations and technical documentation.

playbooks.headline: Go-to-market compliance path for SaaS and software teams
playbooks.summary: Software companies expanding beyond Turkey usually need privacy readiness first, then security and quality maturity.

playbooks.headline: Multi-market compliance plan for e-commerce companies
playbooks.summary: E-commerce operations often combine privacy obligations, customer trust requirements, and process maturity needs.

playbooks.headline: Export-readiness playbook for manufacturers
playbooks.summary: Manufacturers usually need both market-specific product compliance and globally credible management systems.

playbooks.headline: Regulated growth path for health and medtech companies
playbooks.summary: Healthcare businesses often manage privacy, quality systems, and product-market regulatory requirements in parallel.
recommendedCertificates: ISO 13485 Medical Device Quality Management System

resources.title: Target-market certification checklist
resources.description: A quick decision checklist for Turkey, Europe, the US, China, and global expansion scenarios.

resources.title: KVKK vs GDPR starter comparison
resources.description: High-level overview of the main operational differences between Turkish and EU privacy obligations.

resources.title: CE, FDA, and CCC market-entry comparison
resources.description: A practical starting point for product companies comparing Europe, US, and China readiness.

resources.title: ISO readiness pack for enterprise sales
resources.description: Core preparation areas for ISO 9001 and ISO 27001 before consulting or audit engagement.

faq.question: Which certifications should a newly established company start with?
faq.answer: That depends on your sector, target market, and whether you process personal data. Privacy obligations usually come first, while ISO certifications often support growth and enterprise sales.

faq.question: What if we plan to sell into more than one country?
faq.answer: You should evaluate all target regions together. In many cases, global ISO standards and region-specific legal obligations need to be planned in the same roadmap.

faq.question: What does the Global option mean?
faq.answer: Global indicates a multi-market expansion goal. In that case, globally recognized standards and region-specific requirements should be viewed together.

faq.question: Do these recommendations replace legal advice?
faq.answer: No. CertiRehber is an information and decision-support tool. Final compliance decisions should be confirmed with official institutions, legal counsel, and accredited bodies.
